descricao: Receives leads from Meta Ads via webhook, looks up course and pricing info, and uses a GPT agent to generate and send personalized opening messages via WhatsApp.
problema: Leads from marketing campaigns went unanswered for hours or received generic messages, hurting conversion rates.
resultado: Immediate, personalized response for every lead, with context on the course of interest.
metrica: First-contact time reduced from hours to seconds
